name: Lanyon (Cvent) Meetings & Group Travel Management API
what_it_does: Lanyon (now Cvent Meetings & Events) strategic meetings management REST API for corporate travel and procurement teams managing hotel RFP, group room block, meetings spend, and compliance. Enables AI agents to manage hotel RFP creation and distribution for venue sourcing automation, handle hotel proposal collection and comparison for meeting venue selection automation, access room block and group reservation management for group hotel booking automation, retrieve meetings spend analysis and policy compliance reporting for strategic meetings management, manage supplier negotiation and contract workflow for hotel master contract automation, handle attendee room block pickup tracking for hotel group operations automation, access meeting budget and cost reporting for corporate meetings spend intelligence, retrieve preferred hotel supplier directory management for corporate hotel program automation, manage meetings policy compliance and approvals workflow for corporate governance, and integrate Lanyon/Cvent with Concur, Egencia, American Express GBT, and corporate ERP for full meetings program management.
use_cases: Sourcing hotels from meetings procurement agents
Managing room blocks from group booking agents
Tracking meetings spend from SMM analytics agents
Enforcing meeting policy from compliance agents
not_for: Individual business travel booking (use Concur or TripActions/Navan)
Event registration and attendee management (use Cvent Event Management)
best_when: A corporate travel or meetings procurement team wanting AI agents to automate hotel RFP distribution, room block management, meetings spend tracking, and supplier compliance within the Cvent/Lanyon strategic meetings management platform.
avoid_when: LANYON CVENT MERGER INTEGRATION COMPLEXITY: Lanyon was acquired by Cvent in 2016 and is now marketed as Cvent Meetings Management; Lanyon-specific API endpoints may have been consolidated into Cvent API platform; verify current Lanyon vs Cvent API endpoint routing before building dedicated Lanyon automation. ROOM BLOCK ATTRITION CLAUSE ACCURACY: Automated room block management must track hotel room pickup against contracted block with attrition clause; automated group booking management without attrition tracking creates hotel room block penalty exposure when pickup falls below contracted minimum. MEETINGS SPEND POLICY COMPLIANCE ENFORCEMENT: Automated meeting approval workflow must apply correct company meeting policy thresholds (spend limit, attendee count, geography) before meeting creation or venue booking; automated bypass of meetings policy approval creates corporate governance and SOX internal control compliance gap for meeting spend authorization.

auth.notes: Lanyon/Cvent uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes (unified Cvent API platform). REST API with JSON. McLean, Virginia HQ (Cvent, Inc.). Lanyon founded 2000, acquired by Cvent in 2016 for $205M. Cvent is private (Vista Equity Partners, taken private 2016 for $1.65B; Vista sold to Blackstone 2023). Cvent processes $2B+ in hotel bookings annually. Meetings Management (formerly Lanyon) product for corporate strategic meetings management (SMM). Hotel supplier directory with 300,000+ properties. Competes with Groupize, Meetio, and American Express Meetings & Events for SMM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription for SMM module
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; Meetings Management module priced separately from Cvent Event Management; enterprise volume pricing
pricing.notes: McLean VA. Cvent (Blackstone PE). Lanyon acquired 2016. $2B+ hotel bookings processed. Annual enterprise subscription for SMM module.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; RFP and room block queries throttled; webhooks for booking and approval events

known_agent_gotchas: LANYON VS CVENT API UNIFICATION: Lanyon functionality has been migrated into Cvent platform API; standalone Lanyon API endpoints from pre-2016 documentation may not be active; use unified Cvent API with appropriate scope for meetings management features; verify current Cvent developer documentation for SMM/meetings management API endpoints

ROOM BLOCK ATTRITION TRACKING FOR PENALTY PREVENTION: Automated hotel room block management must track contracted block quantity vs actual pickup with attrition clause deadline visibility; automated room block management without attrition monitoring creates hotel attrition penalty at room block cutoff date; implement pickup-to-block ratio monitoring with attrition threshold alerts

MEETINGS POLICY APPROVAL WORKFLOW BYPASS RISK: Automated meeting creation and venue booking must enforce corporate meetings policy approval workflow (spend threshold, attendee count, geography restrictions); automated booking without policy approval creates corporate governance gap; SOX-controlled companies require documented approval chain for meeting spend authorization

Hotel supplier directory accuracy for RFP distribution — Cvent supplier directory hotel data freshness varies; automated hotel RFP distribution using stale supplier data (closed hotels, changed ownership) creates failed RFP delivery; implement supplier data validation before automated RFP distribution

Rate agreement and preferred supplier discount application — automated hotel RFP negotiation should apply corporate preferred supplier agreements and pre-negotiated discount structures; automated vanilla RFP without preferred supplier recognition fails to leverage negotiated rates; configure preferred supplier profiles before automated sourcing

GDPR event attendee data for EU meetings — automated group booking and attendee management for EU-based corporate meetings involves EU employee PII (name, email, travel preferences); automated data collection must comply with GDPR; employee consent for meetings management data processing must be established through corporate data processing agreement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Meetings management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Corporate meetings spend and attendee travel data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Meetings management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Corporate meetings spend and attendee data.
